# `pip-compile requirements.in`, review the diff, test, commit both files.
# See README "Keeping it patched" for the full workflow.

#   cryptography >= 46.0.7  (CVE-2026-39892, buffer overflow)
#   werkzeug     >= 3.1.5   (CVE-2026-21860, path traversal in safe_join)
#   requests     >= 2.33.0  (CVE-2026-25645, predictable temp filename)
#

# by the following command:
#
#    pip-compile --output-file=requirements.txt requirements.in
